creator: anders@totem.tihlde.hist.no
text:
The accompanying norwegian keycap entry is not usable. Several characters
are not mapped, and many are mapped wrong.

Fix: 

Use this entry in /usr/share/misc/keycap.pcvt instead..
	
# Norwegian keyboard map with national characters.
# Anders Nordby, nickerne@nome.no
no|norway|Norwegian 8bit mapping ISO 8859-1:\
 	:K1=\174:S1=\247:\
	:K2=\61:S2=\41:\
	:K3=\62:S3=\42:A3=\100:\
 	:K4=\63:S4=\43:A4=\243:\
 	:K5=\64:S5=\244:A5=\44:\
 	:K6=\65:S6=\45:\
 	:K7=\66:S7=\46:\
 	:K8=\67:S8=\57:A8=\173:\
 	:K9=\70:S9=\50:A9=\133:\
 	:K10=\71:S10=\51:A10=\135:\
        :K11=\60:S11=\75:A11=\175:\
	:K12=\53:S12=\77:\
	:K13=\134:S13=\140:A13=\264:\
	:K28=\250:S28=\136:A28=\176:\
	:K29=\47:S29=\52:\
	:K54=\56:S54=\72:\
	:K53=\54:S53=\73:\
	:K55=\55:S55=\137:\
        :K41=\346:S41=\306:\
	:K40=\370:S40=\330:\
        :K27=\345:S27=\305:\
	:l1#62:a0:
How-To-Repeat: 
Execute this..

kcon -m no
